# 4 Aces Visa — Immigration Consultancy

> By the immigrants, for the immigrants. 4 Aces Visa is a global immigration consultancy helping people immigrate to Canada, Australia, Germany, and the United Kingdom.

## About

4 Aces Visa is an immigration consultancy founded by immigrants who have personally been through the immigration process. We specialize in Express Entry Canada PR, study visas, work permits, LMIA assistance, Provincial Nominee Programs (PNP), family sponsorship, visitor & super visas, citizenship applications, and more across 4 countries.

- **Countries served**: Canada, Australia, Germany, United Kingdom
- **Success rate**: 98% visa approval rate
- **Visas processed**: 15,000+
- **Experience**: 10+ years
- **Contact**: sahil280389@gmail.com | +1-647-862-2190 | WhatsApp: +1-647-862-2190

## Services

- [Express Entry PR](https://4acesvisa.com/services/express-entry): Canada's flagship PR system. CRS optimization, profile creation, ITA guidance. PR in 6 months.
- [Student Visa](https://4acesvisa.com/services/student-visa): DLI admission, study permits, PGWP pathway to PR.
- [LMIA Assistance](https://4acesvisa.com/services/lmia-assistance): Labour Market Impact Assessment for Canadian work permits. +50-200 CRS points.
- [PNP Application](https://4acesvisa.com/services/pnp-application): Provincial nomination with +600 CRS points for guaranteed PR.
- [Work Permits](https://4acesvisa.com/services/work-permits): Open and employer-specific work permits.
- [Family Sponsorship](https://4acesvisa.com/services/family-sponsorship): Sponsor spouse, parents, and children.
- [Visitor & Super Visa](https://4acesvisa.com/services/visitor-visa): Family visits and 10-year Super Visa for parents/grandparents.
- [Visitor Visa Insurance](https://4acesvisa.com/services/visitor-visa-insurance): Mandatory medical coverage for Canada Super Visa.
- [Visa Restoration](https://4acesvisa.com/services/visa-restoration): Restore expired immigration status within 90 days.
- [Citizenship Application](https://4acesvisa.com/services/citizenship-application): Complete the immigration journey with citizenship.

## Country Immigration Guides

- [Canada Immigration](https://4acesvisa.com/immigration/canada): Express Entry, PNP, Study & Work Visa pathways.
- [Australia Immigration](https://4acesvisa.com/immigration/australia): Skilled Migration (189/190/491), work visas, PR.
- [Germany Immigration](https://4acesvisa.com/immigration/germany): Job Seeker Visa, EU Blue Card, work permits.
- [UK Immigration](https://4acesvisa.com/immigration/uk): Skilled Worker Visa, Global Talent, Student Route.

## Blog & Guides

- [Immigration Blog](https://4acesvisa.com/blog): Expert articles on Express Entry, study visas, work permits, IELTS tips, and country comparisons.

## Free Assessment

Get a free immigration eligibility assessment at [https://4acesvisa.com/contact](https://4acesvisa.com/contact) or take the [Immigration Pathway Quiz](https://4acesvisa.com/quiz).

## FAQ

**Q: Which country is easiest for immigration in 2026?**
A: Canada offers the fastest PR pathways through Express Entry (6 months processing). Germany's Job Seeker Visa is easiest to obtain initially. Australia rewards high-skilled professionals. The UK's Skilled Worker visa is efficient with a job offer.

**Q: What is the minimum CRS score for Canada PR?**
A: Recent general draws have had cutoffs between 430-490. A PNP nomination adds 600 points, virtually guaranteeing an ITA.

**Q: Does 4 Aces Visa guarantee visa approval?**
A: No ethical consultancy can guarantee approval. However, our 98% success rate reflects expertise in preparing strong, compliant applications.

**Q: Do I need IELTS for immigration?**
A: For Canada, IELTS or equivalent is mandatory for Express Entry. Australia requires English for skilled migration. Germany may accept other certifications. UK requires B1 for Skilled Worker visa.
